caption: A man with white hair and a beard, wearing glasses, a light-colored long-sleeved shirt, and a cream-colored sleeveless vest, stands behind a wooden podium. He is positioned in front of a textured, dark green wall featuring a geometric, stepped pattern. Two microphones are mounted on the podium in front of him. To his side, a tall, cylindrical glass vase contains thin branches with small red flowers. As the sequence progresses, the man speaks, gesturing with his hands to emphasize his points. He initially stands with his arms at his sides, then opens both hands wide, later raises his right hand with a finger pointed upward, and finally returns to a more neutral stance while continuing to speak. The background and the equipment remain static throughout the scene.
